speaker: MATT
raw_text: Gmmm tips. They are now. It is now Matthew Mercer's Gmmm Tips. Thank you, Travis. Disadvantage. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it pronounced GM tips, or gmmm tips?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 28, okay. It'll take you the better part of about an hour to really harvest everything you want from this that's usable, and that's with aid from Scanlan, because it's a very big dragon, and that's a pretty small blade. So you begin that process.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you head to the dragon. Okay. So you guys head over there. You now see partially elements of the wall that had crumbled in on Vorugal's body. You see now, emerging from the center of the scales in the chest as it lays on its back, slain, its throat torn out by Raishan, a piercing tree begins to burrow its way through the torso of the dragon and bloom outwards. Waiting for that process to finish, you bring out your carving dagger and--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I patiently wait for the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to interrupt. That's rude.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It grows pretty fast as part of the enchantment of Fenthras. So, that brief pause completed, you go to town with your blade on the dragon's corpse. Let's go ahead and make a check on this. This would be--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nature, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: With advantage. Oh, that's good. 28.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Perhaps some teeth and claws as well. We shall trade." (speaks Draconic) All of them rush up and start hacking into the soft portions of the underbelly, where it's been exposed from where you guys have left large wounds and such and basically start to carve huge bits of dragon meat off the body.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, wait, no. Hold on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. I'm going to point at all-- you all, sun goes down, all of us drink back there. Go back. Everything's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Skork takes two steps forward and goes, "I understand this speak."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, why didn't you say something? You're standing there making us very nervous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (disgruntled grunt) "Look. We have to come to aid you in the battle as promised. You have seemingly done well without our presence. So let's all harvest the uses of what remains of this beast."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm fair with that, all right. Harvest gently. We're trying to keep as much of it--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I'm working right here on this area and Vex wants a claw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Take what you wish. We are interested in hide and meat."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And we are interested in scale, tooth, and claw, and maybe some eyeballs, so that works out very well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And blood.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, and as you start, each punch, the ice (splintering noise) more cracks begin to spider out. An incredible feat of strength and you can see the dragonborn take a few steps back at this view, and Tooma is almost intrigued at this point, staring with this grin across her face as this symbolic destruction of what represented Vorugal's lording over their entire life is being ripped apart by this half-giant madman. A few more punches through and a whole portion slides off and you have to move out of the way. You knock it aside with your fist and keep punching through and eventually you get about, over the next ten or 15 minutes, breaking through enough of the ice that you start hitting (clanging), starting to hit the actual outskirts of this large pile of gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nothing there, Grog. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No! It has to be here somewhere!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Just look right there, friend.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Where? What?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's my BFF.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I see it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, once he points it out, you immediately clarify and the red haze that was covering your eyes suddenly fades and you see shiny.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I use the siege portion of the Titanstone Knuckles and start smacking the shit out of this ice trying to get down there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just like (smashing noises).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I deal double damage against objects or structures.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You get about 20 minutes of gathering gold and platinum pieces from the section you have access to. You could get more, if you continue to dig beneath, probably. You manage to pull roughly, between the three of you, 18,000 gold pieces and about 12,000 platinum pieces. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have never been so sure in your life that this sword: totally not trapped.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm so hoping it talks to you now, I'm so hoping it starts talking to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 'Tis clean.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 'Tis clean?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You hold it, I can't hold it, it's too heavy. It weighs as much as I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How's it feel, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Feels like money, money, money.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Speaking of money, money, money.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you begin pulling out these materials, a series of the other Ravenites start gathering gold, filling sacks and having to pass them off. You see now two of them are pulling two big carts over and are loading up cash in the area. This is going to push your bag of holding.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's why I said we can't take that much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But if it's platinum, it'll help.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: More bang for our buck.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What can we lose from the bag of holding?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm very emotional about some of this.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can take a short rest and take time with the item to figure out what it could do, if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and these boots!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Leather boots, could be anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are they magic, Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh sure, I'll look at those. Wow, 24! Arcana check, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. They're very simple leather boots, there's no real ornamentation beyond being functional boots. As you take a moment to look at them, there is a faint shimmer to the leather itself. When the light hits it, the brown gives way to a slight purplish undertone. It looks to have some sort of enchantment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does it seem evil or good?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have no idea. However, they look fancy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They are interesting, and I'm indifferent to such things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to put one on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead, put one on, what could happen? We're in a safe place.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I just want to see what it does.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what if it's single use only?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, now's a good time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a boot, it's probably made for multiple uses.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Like Stone of Jordans now. It's the thing you trade. Props to you if you know what that reference was. What do you guys want to do? Do you want to take a short rest to try and figure things out?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have no idea. However, they look fancy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They are interesting, and I'm indifferent to such things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to put one on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead, put one on, what could happen? We're in a safe place.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I just want to see what it does.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what if it's single use only?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, now's a good time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a boot, it's probably made for multiple uses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can take a short rest and take time with the item to figure out what it could do, if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I attune to my staff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you attune to your staff. What are you unattuning from?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Currently my Ring of Protection.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's painful.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: AC down!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So all your saves are down by two, your AC is down by two, for now. Good to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: By the way, we have two unused Ring of Protections that we can trade for things. I have one that I haven't used in months.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so as you guys make a short rest. Keyleth, you identify both potions, one of which is a Potion of Speed.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've got a vial with yellow and black swirly stuff in it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That requires somebody who knows things.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll look at that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a check on the potion since I've got alchemy training?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what? Yeah, if you wanted to take a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's some bracelets and such, I thought I'd take a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a gold and platinum band with braids.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ah, I'll take a look at the back-blades.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The back-blades. That's nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So Keyleth was taking a look at the potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What about the bracelet, you also had a bracelet with a sapphire?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I just gave it to back-blades over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, you had a ring and you had a bracelet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a platinum bracelet which I assumed was just fancy and pretty. Here, look at that one too, Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think I can only handle one of these, but we'll find out what happens.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Half all damage for a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So Keyleth was taking a look at the potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What about the bracelet, you also had a bracelet with a sapphire?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I just gave it to back-blades over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, you had a ring and you had a bracelet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a platinum bracelet which I assumed was just fancy and pretty. Here, look at that one too, Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think I can only handle one of these, but we'll find out what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as you guys make a short rest. Keyleth, you identify both potions, one of which is a Potion of Speed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's what I thought it was. The yellow one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. The other is a Potion of Invulnerability.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What does it do? Read it! Out loud, with your mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For one minute after you drink this potion, you have resistance to all damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: God-mode!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The potion's syrupy liquid looks like liquefied iron.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So you half all damage.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That's right, because you got your forms back at a short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you have another one you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Watch this Grog, watch this. I'm going to do Conjure Elemental.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, and which elemental are you going to conjure?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What elemental?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Earth, big!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Earth!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as she slams the staff in the ground and you feel this quaking, and the sandpit behind her begins to slowly billow and rise up. As the sand falls away from underneath, you see, standing behind and looming over Keyleth, this giant, cracked stone earth elemental, very much like the form she often takes, standing behind her. Its eyes flash up with a bright green glow and it sits there, awaiting her command.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then I do a bonus action and I also turn into an earth elemental.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (McCree voice) Now I've got a reason to go ahead and wear myself a tucked-in shirt. (normal voice) Anyway, let's get into the game. You guys, finishing those scenes. Taking a short rest. You roll your hit dice to heal up a bit. What more do you wish to accomplish? What's your next plan of action, Vox Machina?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello, everyone and welcome back to Critical Role! After a barrage of delightful phrases that were just shouted at me. It's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Love you, Matt!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Love you too, guys. I do want to say real fast that our wonderful Kiki Day, who made a number of other Vestiges--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fenthras!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Made Fenthras, made--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And the Spire!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Made the Spire of Conflux, which you can see on Marisha's twitter right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Geek & Sundry's twitter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Geek & Sundry's twitter. As well as making me a belt buckle that I'm going to be wearing at Blizzcon. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's fucking fantastic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a badass motherfucking belt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (McCree voice) Just saying.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (Oprah voice) Spire of Conflux!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. All right, so you guys take your long rest. You regain your spells, you're all full hit points, you regain half your max hit dice. So if you spent more than half of your hit dice, you still--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I propose that we have an evening's rest. In the morning--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We should go now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. Maybe you need to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I think we need an evening's rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have 25 hit points. I'm fine!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Well, Pike is resting because she was hurt quite badly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but did you see her fun buns, though? I did those.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You did her fun buns?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I pulled little fun buns--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Okay! That's good--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What do you think I meant?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I didn't think anything, I'm going up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What else does fun buns mean except for little, cute, little hairballs on your hair?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll give you a book later.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah! You have a book?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a few. I have a library.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, gosh! Neither Vax nor Liam knew there was anything other than little cute hair buns-- Fun buns. What is a "fun bun" besides a fun bun?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ask Larkin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You guys! We got to find Larkin!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He looks for a second and says, "It is nothing for us. But we've worked around it." He points down, and you can see the portion of it that has collapsed, filled in part at the side and shoveled out in these large chunks of ice that are sitting outside of this cavern area. Parts of the ship have been moved around-- it looks like it's been somewhat damaged. It's not a full ship. It's a large portion of a ship. It looks like in whatever battle or attack that Vorugal took this ship, it destroyed a huge portion of it in doing so and took the rest of it with it, in pieces. And it is a very pretty ship. It looks like it may have been the jewel of a navy somewhere. And here it resides. However, it does appear like the ship has seen many moons since it was originally taken, if that makes any sense. Like, it wasn't brought directly here. It looks like almost a keepsake that Vorugal has moved from lair to lair.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If you could let them know that we're going to make one last venture into the ship and then we'll be on our way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I walk up to one of the guys going in, and say in Draconic, have you unearthed the giant ship yet?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You get there, and through the use of your elemental magics, you easily cast aside the snow. And from underneath, you can see where once there was a heavy amount of cropland that has all died off because of the recent freeze that came with Vorugal. You take the eight hours to concentrate and as you, do you enrich the land. You can watch as many of these dead seeds come to life with green once more. Suddenly, you see sprouting bits of delicious cabbages and other forms of produce begin to spring to life and grow nutrient rich. As this happens, you can see a few of the Ravenites who followed you to watch this are taken aback and excitedly rush down to tell the rest of the people. The rest of you are bored out of your mind for the next eight hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Boy, guys!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Super boring day for us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: God, I want to get in that ship!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I start doing that and revitalizing their landscape as close to what it was before, giving their-- [no audio]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It affects all normal plants within a hundred-foot radius. So you have a very specific portion that you revitalize in the ravine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, I talked to Tooma and find out where she--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, no, all plants in a half-mile radius are--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's what I thought, yeah. In the eight hour one that's like, crazy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I should have kept reading. Okay, so yeah. You talk to her about it, and she tells you, "The ravine itself does not have the nutrients to support crops, but we had farmland right above the ravine."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Do you plan to still reside there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Once the snow melts, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll do what I can. And I go there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Do you plan to still reside there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Once the snow melts, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll do what I can. And I go there.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you guys have fun sparring for a while, you beat the crap out of each other off and on for a few hours and you both feel good about it. When the eight hours have finished, you guys reconvene.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Kima and I are sparring.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Challenge Vax to a peeing in the snow contest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's had a lot of wine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, that was last night.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So you're pretty hungover, you don't have a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Distance and accuracy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (sings a fanfare) I've brought one from your house.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It disappeared.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Damn it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, as you reach for it, there's nothing there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.
